details.message: reports/board/ was missing and auto-created during this run. All other expected top-level directories (src/, scripts/, reports/, memory_bank/, docs/, validation/, .cursor/, reports/audit/) were present.

moltbot/ directory exists at repo root with active Python code: board.py, sentinel.py, orchestrator.py, memory_evolution.py, promotion_discipline.py, __init__.py, agents/. This deprecated directory should have been removed per governance policy.

Moltbot code/config references found outside of reports/audit or removal-documentation: (1) moltbot/ directory with 5+ active Python modules, (2) scripts/run_molt_workflow.py imports from moltbot package, (3) scripts/run_openclaw_molt_synthesis.py references Clawdbot in operational comments. Governance policy requires these be fully removed from code/config.
